data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. VELOCITY MOONLIT made an impressive debut when was quickly into stride and burnt early from out wide where she gave a sight, finishing third (24.49) and beaten 14 lengths over 407m at this track. Should be further improved and can open winning account this time. 1. TEGAN HAYZE jumped from the squeeze on debut and finished well back at this track over 407m (24.34). Drops down the inside box this time. This looks easier and expected to improve sharply. 6. FIERY WORDS stalked lead from an outside box last start before finishing second (24.70) at this track in a Maiden over 407m. Has good speed so she should be prominent despite the draw. Ready to find winning form. 2. ROSA'S SUMMER should be thereabouts.","runners":[4,1,6,2],"exclusive":false}
